title: Upcoming Events - Michael Wheeler
meta_description: Member of Parliament for Worsley & Eccles
text_excerpt: Upcoming Events - Michael Wheeler Skip to main content Michael Wheeler Member of Parliament for Worsley & Eccles Join Get Involved Donate About Michael How Can I Help You Personal Casework Contact Me My Work In Worsley & Eccles Constituency Surgery Information Upcoming Events Latest News In Parliament Committees APPGs Visiting Parliament More Search Search the website Search Menu Upcoming Events Get involved with your local Labour Party Do you want to make a positive change in our community? Whether you’re a seasoned campaigner or just curious about where to start, there’s always something to get stuck into – from street stalls and canvassing to community events and campaign planning. Everyone’s welcome, and no experience is needed – just your enthusiasm and a bit of time. If you’ve got questions or want to find out more, feel free to get in touch by email at michael.wheeler.mp@parliament.uk . We’d love to hear from you.
